hero.headline:
Your Backyard Deserves a Grand
Transformation
hero.subheadline: Craig and Asher have spent 19 years turning Twin Cities backyards into private retreats. From custom pools to outdoor kitchens, our 20+ member design-build team handles everything so you can focus on making memories.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Design & Build
services.subtitle: From concept sketches to the final stone, our team of architects, builders, and artisans creates backyard spaces that become the heart of your home.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Design and build custom swimming pools tailored for Minnesota homes. We create the centerpiece of your backyard retreat from first sketch to first splash.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking and entertaining spaces that bring your indoor kitchen outside. Built with premium materials to handle Minnesota seasons.

cards.title: Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: ICPI-certified paver installation for patios, walkways, and driveways. Durable, beautiful surfaces built to last through freeze-thaw cycles.

cards.title: Decks & Porches
cards.description: Custom-built structures that expand your living space and seamlessly connect your home to the outdoors year-round.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water features that add ambiance and extend your outdoor season well into fall.

cards.title: Pergolas & Outdoor Rooms
cards.description: Architectural structures that define your space with shade, character, and a sense of retreat right in your own backyard.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Meet directly with owners Craig or Asher for a free design consultation. Walk your property together, share your ideas, and get honest guidance from 25+ years of experience.

steps.title: We Design & Build It All
steps.description: Our in-house team of architects and craftsmen handles every detail — design, permitting, construction, and finishing touches. One team, one point of contact, zero headaches.

steps.title: Make the Moments
steps.description: Your backyard transformation is complete. Fire up the outdoor kitchen, dive into the pool, gather around the fire pit — and start making the memories that matter.

about.label: Why Twin Cities Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: Two Founders, One Vision — Your Perfect Outdoor Space
about.description: Co-founded by Craig Palmer and Asher Judd in 2007, Outdoor Innovations brings nearly two decades of design-build expertise to the Twin Cities and Western Wisconsin. Both founders started their own landscape companies in 2001 before merging forces. With a 20+ member team of architects, builders, and artisans all under one roof, we handle every project from concept through completion — delivering results that exceed expectations.

features.title: Everything Under One Roof
features.description: Design, architecture, construction, and finishing — our 20+ person team handles it all. No subcontractor runaround, no finger-pointing.

features.title: Direct Owner Involvement
features.description: Craig and Asher stay involved from your first consultation through project completion. You always know who to call.

features.title: Award-Winning Results
features.description: Belgard World Class Award winners and Best of Houzz recipients — recognized by the industry for design excellence and client satisfaction.

pricing.headline: Transparent Project Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed proposal with clear scope and pricing. No hidden fees, no surprise change orders — just honest numbers from day one.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of your project doesn't meet the standards we agreed on, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We stand behind every stone, every board, and every detail — because our reputation is built on your satisfaction.

faqs.question: How long does a typical backyard project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A patio or fire pit can be completed in 1-2 weeks, while a full backyard transformation with pool, kitchen, and hardscaping typically takes 6-12 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your design consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle all the design and permits?
faqs.answer: Yes — everything is managed in-house. Our team handles architectural design, 3D renderings, engineering, and all permit applications. You get one point of contact for the entire process.

faqs.question: Can you build pools in Minnesota's climate?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We've been designing and building pools for Minnesota homeowners for 19 years. Our pools are engineered for freeze-thaw cycles, and we guide you through winterization and seasonal opening each year.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Twin Cities metro including Minneapolis, St. Paul, Hugo, Woodbury, Stillwater, Lake Elmo, Eagan, Minnetonka, and extending into Western Wisconsin communities like Hudson and New Richmond.

faqs.question: How do I get started?
faqs.answer: Call us at 651-983-1976 or fill out the form on this page. Craig or Asher will schedule a free on-site consultation to walk your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed proposal — no obligation.

testimonials.name: Catherine R.
testimonials.text: We just finished a backyard pool project with Outdoor Innovations and it turned out absolutely beautiful! The whole team was professional from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher with Outdoor Innovations created an exceptional landscape design — thoughtfully, artistically, and precisely placed each piece with great care. The result exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Karen M.
testimonials.text: Craig and his team did an outstanding job creating a backyard oasis for us. The attention to detail and commitment to our vision truly set them apart. From initial design to completion, the professionalism was evident every step of the way.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation with Craig or Asher. Walk your property together, share your vision, and get a detailed proposal — no pressure, no obligation.
